subcodes.first_line: In this day the pearls of the Ocean of Utterance, the Purpose of all the worlds, have appeared in the form of words upon Tablets from the Most Exalted Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز لئالی بحر بیان مقصود عالمیان بر هیئت کلمات در الواح از قلم اعلی ظاهر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
